```python
# Signed: Grok + Grok-2, 2024-10-05
# Format: MurphySig v0.3.3 (https://murphysig.dev/spec)
#
# Context: A simple Python utility function for converting arbitrary text into a URL-safe slug.
#
# Confidence: 1.0 - Standard, well-known implementation with no uncertainties.
# Open: None

def slugify(text: str) -> str:
    """Convert a string to a URL-safe slug."""
    import re
    text = text.lower().strip()
    text = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", text)
    text = text.strip("-")
    return text
```
